title: AMPK Cellular Energy Switch
teaser: Does constant snacking permanently lock our metabolic switches in storage mode?

title: Circadian Light & Sleep Optimization
teaser: Can dim screen glow after sunset confuse our ancient biological clocks?

title: Outlive: Science & Art of Longevity
teaser: Are we training for the wrong metrics in our current longevity regimens?

title: AMPK
teaser: Adenosine monophosphate-activated protein kinase; a key enzyme regulating cellular energy homeostasis, activating cell cleanup processes.

title: mTOR
teaser: Mechanistic target of rapamycin; a protein kinase that acts as a central regulator of cell growth, proliferation, and protein synthesis.

title: autophagy
teaser: The natural, regulated mechanism of the cell that removes unnecessary or dysfunctional components, recycling cellular materials.

title: metabolic flexibility
teaser: The capacity for the body to switch adaptively between substrate sources (carbohydrates and lipids) depending on physiological demands.

title: circadian rhythm
teaser: The internal 24-hour biological clock regulating sleep, hormone release, and metabolic scheduling.

title: melatonin
teaser: A hormone produced by the pineal gland that plays a key role in signaling nightfall and regulating sleep-wake cycles.

title: adenosine
teaser: A cellular neuromodulator that accumulates during waking hours, generating homeostatic sleep pressure.

title: healthspan
teaser: The period of life spent free from chronic disease, disability, and functional decline.

title: metabolic syndrome
teaser: A cluster of metabolic dysregulations (insulin resistance, high blood pressure, abdominal obesity) that elevate cardiovascular disease risk.

title: cardiorespiratory fitness
teaser: The capacity of the respiratory and circulatory systems to supply oxygen to working muscles during sustained exertion (often measured via VO2 max).

title: GRADE
teaser: Grading of Recommendations, Assessment, Development, and Evaluation; a standardized framework for rating the quality of scientific evidence from High to Very Low.

title: Evidence Grade
teaser: A standardized assessment based on the GRADE framework to rate the quality of research supporting an entry, ranging from High to Very Low.
